title: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control
description: On pages 9–11, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Caesar Clown, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the enemy tries to regain control.
scene: The scene focuses on the enemy tries to regain control, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Caesar Clown, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

summary: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
